description: Built client-facing eCommerce and informatics applications in JavaScript, ReactJS, and Redux, with a focus on performance, code quality, and reducing technical debt.
achievements: Developed 3+ client-facing eCommerce and informatics applications in JavaScript, ReactJS, and Redux — wireframed in Sketch and Adobe XD — saving the company ~$90K annually.

Optimized page load speed from 5,000ms to 25ms (99.5% improvement) by implementing more efficient data structures to store, sort, and process Bitcoin data queries (JavaScript, Node.js, Express, MySQL).
Built an interactive phone-carrier coverage map using Mapbox GL JS and React for a major telecom company.
Managed code quality with 20+ unit tests using Jest/Enzyme to reduce technical debt.
